item.title: BenCrellin: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 2h My anxiety levels are pretty high right now. I dreamt last night that I was trying to avoid
item.description: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 2h My anxiety levels are pretty high right now. I dreamt last night that I was trying to avoid being drafted into the army to fight in a World War! 14 4 108 32 mil

item.title: BenCrellin: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 10min En respuesta a @BenCrellin I think it was WW2 and not WW3 FWIW 4 1 mil
item.description: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 10min En respuesta a @BenCrellin I think it was WW2 and not WW3 FWIW 4 1 mil

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 10min #ManCity were crowned 2017/2018 Premier League CHAMPIONS, eight years ago today. De Premi
item.description: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 10min #ManCity were crowned 2017/2018 Premier League CHAMPIONS, eight years ago today. De Premier League 5 17 130 2 mil

item.title: LFC: Liverpool FC @LFC · 10min Our thoughts on this significant and poignant day, as always, are with all those affected by t
item.description: Liverpool FC @LFC · 10min Our thoughts on this significant and poignant day, as always, are with all those affected by the tragedy at Hillsborough and we pause in memory of the 97 fans who will never be forgotten. 62 380 1 mil 20 mil

item.title: fc_mossman: Spencer Mossman @fc_mossman · 14min Cita Physio Scout | Football Injury Analysis @physioscout · 1h Hugo Ekitike had to b
item.description:
Spencer Mossman @fc_mossman · 14min Cita Physio Scout | Football Injury Analysis @physioscout · 1h Hugo Ekitike had to be stretchered off in Liverpool vs. PSG with an Achilles injury.
Typical non-contact push-off mechanism during acceleration usually points towards an Achilles rupture.
Ekitike was also seen palpating his Achilles/calf complex after the incident.
Expected 6 682
